They would love to buy their very own holiday home there for a maximum budget of £160,000. Jean Johansson shows them five properties, hoping at least one will be perfect enough for Anne-Marie and Adrian to put in an offer

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Spain, demolitions are under way at Tom and Terrys BandB. Eight years of building works have finished in France, but can Paul and Fiona successfully transition to hosting? And will Leah and Joaos efforts to open their cocktail bar pay off?

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In Normandy, Terry and Ashley race to finish the 401 Suite and re-hang a 200-crystal chandelier. At Château Mareuil, Belinda and Lee tackle mould in a tower. In the Loire Valley, Vivienne and Simon rush to finish a bathroom mural before Mum arrives

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Jon is given the all-clear to return to his day job as a camera operator. Work starts in the garden and Jasmines carpenter brother Andrew gets involved, making bookshelves for Joys bedroom

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets Michelle and Derek, who have bought a cosy cottage in the South Downs National Park. The only problem is, it needs a lot of work and a lack of spare cash means they have to do most of the work themselves. Sarah also follows Archie and Lauren who have grand plans to add value to their Somerset home by building a large outdoor kitchen, and reveals more secrets of the trade at a Devon auction house

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu. Intelligence analyst Alexander Hale becomes prime suspect when his agency, the Orphanage, suspects a mole is operating within its ranks. But as he tries to prove his innocence, he makes a shocking discovery - his brain has been hacked, giving the perpetrators access to everything he sees and hears. Co-starring Melissa Barrera and Sinclair Daniel

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Forced into an uneasy alliance, Alexander and the Orphanage must work together to protect their discovery of the hack. Relying on a plan from untested agent Parker, a deadly trap dangles Alexander and Michelle as bait. Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: In a mission where nothing is as it seems, Alexander must save a sources life by risking his own. Michelle gets a visit from the past. Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crews respond to headteacher Andy who has collapsed after a cardiac arrest in Essex and warehouse employee Rob who is trapped under a pallet of granite in Ipswich. Katie, who is 13-weeks pregnant, calls for help when she keeps having seizures and the Essex and Herts Air Ambulance crew help Jo who has been lying on the bathroom floor with a broken ankle for nine hours

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jacks Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chefs advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The sixth hunt gets underway, and a first-time Predators ruthless pursuit is soon rewarded, even if its not the capture some were hoping for. Alliances chop and change, and the Predators join forces to hunt one unlucky player, who assumes their fate is sealed. But back at basecamp, a last-minute plot turns the game on its head

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The final five players embark on their most important hunt yet. With one player still reeling from losing their last remaining ally, rivalries are at an all-time high and the last two Predators are determined to guarantee their place in the final. But as the Prey desperately try to evade capture, a last-minute move threatens one players place in the contest

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Wendi Peters and Ricky Groves go head to head as they take on lint roller printing, while Sharron Davies and Tanni Grey-Thompson have a slogan banner craft-off

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of property-hunters in Buckinghamshire and Berkshire. Having booked almost 40 viewings without success, newlyweds Hannah and Hassan want a four-bedroom house in the High Wycombe area with space for a full-size snooker table, while in Reading, sisters Gemma and Lucy insist on two of everything, from bedrooms and bathrooms to parking spaces

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect meets Duncan and Josie, who are taking on an 18th-century barn perched on the edge of a pretty green, containing some very dodgy decor including a purple striped 80s kitchen and a miniature kitchen extension built to house a washing machine. Duncan and Josie need to make it liveable very quickly as they welcome their new baby Ruby, so George sets out to make the dark, cramped layout work for modern family living. He also heads to Southport, Merseyside, to see a Victorian gothic property in need of attention. Owners Jenny and Fadi are keen to resore the pile to its original splendor

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: American TV host Dick Cavett persuades Sam to write his autobiography, convincing him it would be a sure-fire bestseller, and Diane reluctantly agrees to help with the manuscript. Meanwhile, an old flame of Veras is back on the scene, to Norms annoyance.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: How Do I Love Thee? Let Me Call You Back
programme.desc: Sam tells Diane he loves her, but she takes his declaration far more seriously than he intended and the pair end up taking some time off from their romance.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Dianes friend Heather flirts aggressively with Sam, making him uncomfortable - but Diane claims he is overreacting to perfectly ordinary social behaviour. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In a bid to outdo Maries culinary skills, Debra goes against tradition by serving a fish dish on Thanksgiving. Not to be upstaged, her meddling mother-in-law turns up with a turkey. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ousted as captain of Nemos basketball team, so Ray replaces him and begins devoting all his time to coaching - leading Debra to accuse him of neglecting the children

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray learns the autographed baseball he has treasured since his father gave it to him as a child is a forgery, and is so shocked that he decides to tell daughter Ally the truth about Father Christmas

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. The Seattle shrink agrees to escort Lana, his former high-school prom queen, to her surprise birthday party - but his ultimate goal is actually to spend time with her attractive friend Claire. Comedy, guest starring Jean Smart and Patricia Clarkson, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. The shrink agrees to tutor a teenager in exchange for a date with Claire, while Roz is rewarded with a day off for taking the youngster to the prom. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, Peri Gilpin and Jean Smart

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles becomes jealous when Daphne meets a dog-lover while out with Eddie. Martin secretly attends the parole hearing of the man who shot him. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink is mortified when he learns Niles, Martin and Daphne are planning to go along on his trip to Belize with Claire. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce, John Mahoney and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarellas in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leones in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the seaside resort of Southport, where Harry comes across some old ammunition crates that he decides to turn into pieces of furniture

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum and Dad
programme.desc: Having spent the past couple of years working flat out at their Durham hill farm, Matt Baker treats his parents, Janice and Mike, to a few excursions in their beloved North East. They begin at Bamburgh Castle Estate, where Matt learns about some antique engineering, tea-loving Janice learns how to blend Earl Grey on the very spot it was invented and Mike has a memorable experience with a vintage luxury car closely linked to the castle

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman heads to Gran Canaria to help Tom from Scotland find the perfect holiday home. Also along to help Tom in his quest is his son Alan, who works with him in the building trade, and would love to visit for family holidays. Working within a budget of £120,000, Ben lines up five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Renovations reach a milestone at Tom and Terrys Spanish BandB. In France, everything hinges on an inspectors approval for Paul and Fiona. Changes are afoot at Leah and Joaos Portuguese cocktail bar. And couple Summer and Ashley take on a top-to-bottom renovation in Italy

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Krys build a wine cave at Château Domaine De La Barde. Alicia and Carlton prepare for their first wedding at Chateau DAran, while Tim and Sasha create a bold, colourful courtyard at Chateau du Puits es Pratx

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: With spirits raised, Jasmine and her husband turn their attention to creating a driveway. The outside staircase finally arrives but installing it doesnt quite go to plan

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: The funnyman climbs into the drivers cab to take charge of some of the worlds most iconic locomotives, learning what it takes to keep them running and meeting the people who keep the railways running. On the Isle of Wight, Paul follows in the footsteps of his tube driver dad by riding up front on the very trains his father would have driven on the Northern Line - now in service on the island. After driving a heritage steam, Paul helps a cow give birth. His journey finishes with a look at how the island was prepared in secret to help with D-Day

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joel Dommett, Joanna Page, Armando Iannucci, Kumail Nanjiani and Amy Gledhill leave their dignity at the door to take part in the comedy challenge show. They begin by hunting for a small creature, serving Taskmaster Greg Davies his fruit and vegetables and trying to catch a golden T-shirt - all under the watchful eye of Alex Horne

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Now that his fake life is up and running, Alexander must act like everything is normal - until he discovers the Orphanage plan to use him to sacrifice a real mission to learn more about their enemy. Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joel Dommett, Joanna Page, Armando Iannucci, Kumail Nanjiani and Amy Gledhill leave their dignity at the door to take part in the comedy challenge show. They begin by hunting for a small creature, serving Taskmaster Greg Davies his fruit and vegetables and trying to catch a golden T-shirt - all under the watchful eye of Alex Horne

programme.title: Sky Coppers
programme.desc: The hunt is on for a man who has assaulted an officer and dragged them along with his car before escaping. Sergeant Keith Bennet and PC Chris Turton search for a motorbike thief hiding in a wood in the dead of night. After reports come in of a man loitering in gardens in Birmingham, the team find out not everything is as it seems

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah and Masons, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentines Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: Countdown (2019)
programme.desc: When a young man arrives in hospital after a car accident, claiming to have an app on his phone that predicts the time of a persons death, nurse Quinn and her colleagues decide to download the app for themselves. Things soon turn ugly when Quinn discovers that, according to the countdown app, she only has three days to live. With the clock ticking and a mysterious figure haunting her, she must find a way to save herself before time runs out. Horror, starring Elizabeth Lail

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Its the final, and just one hunt stands between the four remaining players and a prize of up to £100,000. But the last hunt comes with a fiendish twist and big-money challenges, meaning the players must deploy every ounce of skill, speed and determination to stay in the game

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crews respond to headteacher Andy who has collapsed after a cardiac arrest in Essex and warehouse employee Rob who is trapped under a pallet of granite in Ipswich. Katie, who is 13-weeks pregnant, calls for help when she keeps having seizures and the Essex and Herts Air Ambulance crew help Jo who has been lying on the bathroom floor with a broken ankle for nine hours

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson is joined by 25 year-old Lauren, a movie buff and professional online gamer from Camberley who is looking for a geeky gamer to be her perfect player two so she can reboot her love life after three years of being single. Ryan who is 28 and from Cheltenham, is looking for his Mr Right. As a sucker for a silver fox and a dad bod, can he find his dream guy to wake up to every morning?

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Chelsea and George seek out a threesome with a woman, but will it help Chelsea move past Georges sexually adventurous past and infidelity? Jess and Ben host a naked dinner party, but Bens insecurities and Jesss social anxiety threaten to jeopardise their hopes of inviting married couple Olivia and Gage back for some intimate time in the bedroom

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Josh Pugh, Lorraine Kelly and Steve Bracknall for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south Wales compete, beginning with Esther and Darryl, who fight for control in the kitchen. Next up are Louise and David, who aim to impress with their Welsh-themed evening, and give a revealing insight into their private lives. The contestants expect an extravagant party on the final night, which is hosted by Carl and Brian, before the winners of the £1,000 prize are announced

programme.title: Kirsties Fill Your House for Free
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp comes to the rescue of Dave and Kate, whose house has been flooded

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George takes on a 17th-century, Grade II listed thatched cottage in Warwickshire. Anthony, a builder, and Emily, a physiotherapist, are determined to turn this rather ramshackle build into their family home. But they may have bitten off more than they can chew

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: When a classy customer falls for Carla, no one can work out why shes not interested. It transpires she is convinced that in order to find her attractive, he must have some fatal flaw. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: One of Sams old friends bets he can break off his romance with Diane inside 24 hours - and starts by revealing he still has his infamous little black book packed with the phone numbers of gorgeous girls

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach is given the chance to manage a Little League baseball team, but pursues the task so ruthlessly that the bar-room regulars begin to question whether they know him at all. Nicholas Colasanto stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie decides 40 years of marriage to Frank is enough for any woman and moves in with Ray - to the delight of Robert, who enjoys being mothered by her. Debra is unhappy with the situation and tries to persuade her father-in-law to apologise, but he is enjoying the single life too much to agree

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debras snooty parents announce they are going to pay a visit - much to the dismay of Ray, who pleads with Frank and Marie to be on their best behaviour and avoid embarrassing him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray ignores Franks advice and loses all his cash in a poker game. Debra urges him to ask for the money back, but he is too proud to beg his father for help. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.desc: The shrink is mortified when he learns Niles, Martin and Daphne are planning to go along on his trip to Belize with Claire. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce, John Mahoney and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarellas in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leones in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the seaside resort of Southport, where Harry comes across some old ammunition crates that he decides to turn into pieces of furniture

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum and Dad
programme.desc: Having spent the past couple of years working flat out at their Durham hill farm, Matt Baker treats his parents, Janice and Mike, to a few excursions in their beloved North East. They begin at Bamburgh Castle Estate, where Matt learns about some antique engineering, tea-loving Janice learns how to blend Earl Grey on the very spot it was invented and Mike has a memorable experience with a vintage luxury car closely linked to the castle

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman heads to Gran Canaria to help Tom from Scotland find the perfect holiday home. Also along to help Tom in his quest is his son Alan, who works with him in the building trade, and would love to visit for family holidays. Working within a budget of £120,000, Ben lines up five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Renovations reach a milestone at Tom and Terrys Spanish BandB. In France, everything hinges on an inspectors approval for Paul and Fiona. Changes are afoot at Leah and Joaos Portuguese cocktail bar. And couple Summer and Ashley take on a top-to-bottom renovation in Italy

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Krys build a wine cave at Château Domaine De La Barde. Alicia and Carlton prepare for their first wedding at Chateau DAran, while Tim and Sasha create a bold, colourful courtyard at Chateau du Puits es Pratx

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: With spirits raised, Jasmine and her husband turn their attention to creating a driveway. The outside staircase finally arrives but installing it doesnt quite go to plan

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: The funnyman climbs into the drivers cab to take charge of some of the worlds most iconic locomotives, learning what it takes to keep them running and meeting the people who keep the railways running. On the Isle of Wight, Paul follows in the footsteps of his tube driver dad by riding up front on the very trains his father would have driven on the Northern Line - now in service on the island. After driving a heritage steam, Paul helps a cow give birth. His journey finishes with a look at how the island was prepared in secret to help with D-Day

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joel Dommett, Joanna Page, Armando Iannucci, Kumail Nanjiani and Amy Gledhill leave their dignity at the door to take part in the comedy challenge show. They begin by hunting for a small creature, serving Taskmaster Greg Davies his fruit and vegetables and trying to catch a golden T-shirt - all under the watchful eye of Alex Horne

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Now that his fake life is up and running, Alexander must act like everything is normal - until he discovers the Orphanage plan to use him to sacrifice a real mission to learn more about their enemy. Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: In a mission where nothing is as it seems, Alexander must save a sources life by risking his own. Michelle gets a visit from the past. Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu

programme.title: Jerry and Marge Go Large (2022)
programme.desc: A couple discover a mathematical loophole in the Massachusetts lottery and win millions to revive and rejuvenate their small town. Comedy drama based on a true story, starring Bryan Cranston, Annette Bening, Rainn Wilson and Larry Wilmore

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah and Masons, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentines Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: Countdown (2019)
programme.desc: When a young man arrives in hospital after a car accident, claiming to have an app on his phone that predicts the time of a persons death, nurse Quinn and her colleagues decide to download the app for themselves. Things soon turn ugly when Quinn discovers that, according to the countdown app, she only has three days to live. With the clock ticking and a mysterious figure haunting her, she must find a way to save herself before time runs out. Horror, starring Elizabeth Lail

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Its the final, and just one hunt stands between the four remaining players and a prize of up to £100,000. But the last hunt comes with a fiendish twist and big-money challenges, meaning the players must deploy every ounce of skill, speed and determination to stay in the game

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In north Devon, artist Steve Pleydell-Pearce veers off from his normal coastal hotspots for Spekes Mill Mouth Waterfall, hoping to capture the grandeur and majesty of the landmark. Steeplejack Andrew Tarplee takes on an ancient church tower in the village of Paul in Cornwall, where he abseils down the 800-year-old tower to repair and repaint its clock faces, protecting them from the ravages of time

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect meets art deco fan Ododu, whos downsized to a Victorian terrace in Brighton but is at a loss about how to connect the kitchen to the garden. For inspiration, he visits Eltham Palace, a showstopping example of deco glamour. George also heads to Stockport, Greater Manchester, to help Sarah, who has just inherited the home she grew up in following her mothers death. With a new baby on the way, shes trying to make the 1890s red brick home work for modern family life, while still preserving some of the features that remind her of her mum

programme.title: Jimmy Carrs Am I the A**hole?
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr, GK Barry and Jamali Maddix pass judgement on a man who faked having a baby, an unrepentant snorer and a brutal date dodger

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Kyle is unimpressed when he realises younger children enjoy too much rehashed material. Meanwhile, Randy worries he cannot go through with a concert he is booked to play at with rappers Nicki Minaj and Iggy Azalea

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray learns the autographed baseball he has treasured since his father gave it to him as a child is a forgery, and is so shocked that he decides to tell daughter Ally the truth about Father Christmas

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra comes down with a bad case of flu and takes to her bed, forcing Ray to look after her and the kids. Unfortunately for him, a meeting with a star quarterback complicates matters. Guest starring Terry Bradshaw

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers the stone in Debras engagement ring is a fake, and decides to get it changed without telling her - only to learn afterwards that she had beaten him to the punch and had her grandmothers $15,000 diamond put in. programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: The chef prepares the perfect meals for social events, beginning with a celebratory meal for family and friends to make up for 18 months of missed family milestones. He showcases a slow-roasted, rolled shoulder of lamb with a fennel, sage and spicy sausage stuffing, drizzled with a herby green sauce made with pistachio, mint and parsley. On the side, Jamie pairs it with crispy lemon roast potatoes, garlicky dressed French beans and a thyme and apricot sauce. He also creates rainbow tomato crostini topped with crumbly cheese, mango caipirinha cocktails, and individual yoghurt panna cottas with elderflower strawberries and a crushed biscuit crumb

programme.desc: The American chef is joined by Michael Symon and the duo prepare a Greek menu including smoked pork ribs, tzatziki and spicy houmous

programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a chocolate-themed menu including cupcakes with a peanut butter frosting, chocolate gelato, a chocolate orange fondue and white chocolate truffles

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers get to grips with chocolate in the semi finals, making chocolate tarts for their signature challenge, a chocolate souffle for the technical bake and chocolate centrepieces for the showstopper. As always, the contestants are tasked with producing something that looks and tastes good, before judges Mary and Paul cast a critical eye over their efforts. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Over the past 10 weeks, the bakers have taken part in 27 challenges, tackling baking disciplines from cakes to bread, pastry to puddings, and biscuits to chocolate. Now, three contestants remain and they must face one more weekend of baking before this years winner is chosen. The signature challenge sees them take on enriched dough as they make filled iced buns, and in the technical the finalists must prove they have mastered something they have all previously struggled with. For the showstopper, they must achieve perfection as they bake classic British cakes in the hope of impressing Mary and Paul for the last time

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Still in Hampshire, James views ex-formula one racer Jody Scheckters epic car collection, and learns of his passion for buffalo mozzarella, which he makes in his dairy. James uses some of the cheese in his buffalo mozzarella, blackberry and beetroot salad, before crossing into Sussex to don fancy dress and experience the Goodwood Revival, which celebrates motorsport from the 1940s to the 1960s. The presenter offers a classic comfort recipe - roast pork with black pudding fritters and caramelised apples as he prepares to watch some of his friends race in the Goodwood Revival TT race

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James is joined by chef and restaurateur Mark Sargeant in Kent, where they cook on the regenerated Folkestone Harbour Arm they and visit a sourdough and beer suppliers located in a shipping container. Mark then takes James on a tour of his Rocksalt restaurant, where he samples the award-winning cuisine before returning to the harbour for one last recipe featuring Folkstone fish

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve contestants begin the battle to be named Britains best amateur baker by judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood, who have created 30 new tasks to test their baking skills and creativity. The first signature challenge takes the bakers back to basics with a British classic, while the technical sees them tackle a popular little cake with a fatless sponge and tricky chocolate work. Finally, the competitors must impress the judges with their first showstopper, but there is nowhere to hide. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Culinary competition in which amateur cooks compete in a variety of culinary challenges, hoping to be crowned Britains best amateur baker. Contestants create a wide range of sweets and pastry dishes, before the judges cast a critical eye over their efforts. Each week, the bakers must prepare their own take on a tried-and-tested recipe, complete a technical challenge with minimal instructions, and finally pull out all the stops to create an outstanding showcase of their talents

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James crosses over the Irish Sea to Northern Ireland, where he is joined by famous local chef Paul Rankin. Their first port of call is the Giants Causeway, where James cooks a fish stew for the crowds, followed by a visit to a family farm in Limavady, where Paul learns how their award-winning rapeseed oil is produced. Things get competitive as the chefs compete in a hovercraft race, and finally James takes to the seas to fish for mackerel

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Fellow chef Paul Rankin gives James a personal tour of Northern Irelands capital city - his home town of Belfast - before the duo enjoy a spot of golf. James pitches up his mobile kitchen right on the green to whip up a tasty dish with bacon, scallops and apples with onion rings, and later cooks a Northern Irish classic - beef with champ, charred onions and parsley oil. Next, James is in Craigavon to visit Danni Barry, the first woman named the best chef in Ireland, who rustles up a dessert using local ingredients. Finally, the presenter visits Strangford Lough to fish for langoustines

programme.desc: A team of five friends answer questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, and then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Have they got what it takes to win a huge cash prize of £125,000?

First up is a cash builder of up to five questions, after which they have the option of playing between two, three, four or five of the Chasers for increasing amounts of money - and those brave enough to take on the Beast, the Governess, the Sinnerman, the Vixen and the Dark Destroyer could walk away with a huge cash prize

Fact-based crime comedy, starring Peter Falk and Paul Sorvino

Western, starring Gregory Peck, Pat Quinn and Robert F Lyons

Gregor Jordans thriller, starring Samuel L Jackson, Carrie-Anne Moss, Michael Sheen and Stephen Root

Crime comedy, with Sean Connery, Dustin Hoffman, Matthew Broderick and Rosana DeSoto

programme.desc: Medics fly to the aid of mountain biker Rob in the Cumbrian mountains. Off-road motorbiker Dean is set to miss his friends 50th birthday celebrations after taking a nasty tumble. Plus, 15-year-old Robbie needs urgent care when he falls from a coastal cliff in South Shields

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Medics battle to keep 48-year-old Paul alive as he suffers a series of heart attacks. Rogers emergency stop halts his day at a scooter rally while, in Cumbria, theres a dramatic mountainside rescue for seriously injured cyclist Nick

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Paul, 38, is rushed into resus after falling 25ft. He is experiencing shooting pains in his back and pins and needles in his feet, leading to concerns he may have injured his spine. Meanwhile, 66-year-old Anthony, who has recently been diagnosed with Parkinsons disease and prostate cancer, has taken a tumble down a flight of stairs at home. Hes very frail and a scan reveals he has broken some ribs, puncturing a lung

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Former boxer Paul, 22, has been stabbed in the face and arm with a broken bottle outside a nightclub in Kingston. As the team works to stop the bleeding and treat the patients wounds, his girlfriend Naveena reflects on his sensitive side. Angela, 93, is brought to AandE by her daughter Elizabeth after suffering from blood loss and disorientation at her care home, while 70-year-old John arrives with his wife Francesca after falling while out running and dislocating his shoulder. programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Breakfast is also a hit, but the hosts have a nagging feeling that one BandBers feedback could make for difficult reading

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers confront each other about their stays at The View, Northern Hotel, The Kirkstyle Inn and Hazeldene Guest House. There are some frosty heating comments and breakfast bombshells, before the payments are revealed and the winners announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: On the third night of the competition taking place in the West Midlands, male model George treats his guests to a mixture of Greek, Caribbean and Italian food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, social worker Tutsi serves up a mixture of Zimbabwean and English dishes. One of Tutsis guests harbours a grudge about some of her previous comments, while some close-to-the-bone nicknames are thrown around the table and theres a very mixed reaction to a surprise worm-eating competition

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in the West Midlands, dark horse Digby plans to surprise his guests with an evening of fancy fine dining. However, Digbys biggest challenge proves to be maintaining harmony between his guests, with George still upset with Sunita for dissing his food and with straight-talking Tutsi trying to pay Liz a compliment which is misinterpreted

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This weeks competition begins in Newquay in Cornwall, at Avalon Guest House, where the owners taste in lime green decor does not prove as relaxing as planned for the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hoteliers spend the night at the Bear Inn at Wincanton, Somerset, where ex-Army man Matt Garvin takes them for a day of survival training - and as a trained chef, hopes to serve up a perfect breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals head to Bournemouth, where Chris and Nicky Horton run the Chelsea Hotel. For entertainment, they treat the guests to a day on the water - but the weather is against them

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house hunting in Essex and Hertfordshire. Kirstie searches for a family home for couple Justin and Christie, who have spent the first five years of their relationship living 50 miles apart, and are desperate to finally live together and start a family. Phil helps Cara and Ben search for a family home near Bishops Stortford

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer step into the middle of a domestic deadlock in Wolverhampton. Gordon, Suky and their three children live in a four-bedroom home that they bought in 2011, lured by the promise of an indoor pool - but while that feature may still be making a splash, the rest of the house is sinking fast. Suky is desperate to escape as she loathes the gloomy interiors, the severe lack of storage and the claustrophobic, isolating kitchen. On the other hand, Gordon is firmly anchored, convinced that with a little help from Kirstie, their house could become the perfect family home

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Piers and police officer Emma plan to build a landmark 21st-century castle in Stratford-upon-Avon which at 1100 square metres, is the biggest ever build featured on the show. With plans to have a tower, castellations, a moat, arrow slits, loggia courtyards and futuristic technology, its set to be the first new listed castle in the UK for 100 years

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team at St Georges treats patients who have injured themselves through work or play. Iain, 60, is rushed in by ambulance after falling 10ft off a ladder on to his head while fixing an air-conditioning unit. He has a deep laceration above his right eye and doctors cant guarantee he wont lose some of his sight. Student teacher Lloyd is helped into AandE by his friend Mollie after injuring his foot on an inflatable obstacle course on their last day at university. Lucy has had a trampolining accident in her familys garden and medics fear the 13-year-old may have suffered a neck injury

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Retired builder Roger has fallen 13ft from his daughters roof and the trauma team is concerned he may have badly injured his head, back and neck. Folk musician Tad, 29, has come to AandE after developing a dangerously high heart rate, and doctors must use an electric shock to try to get it back to normal. Meanwhile, 69-year-old Richard is brought in after being found unwell at home by his son, and there are fears he has developed a serious infection

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man has a blackout driving a van and crashes into a telegraph pole. This is the second time it has happened in as many weeks and paramedics are keen to find out why

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team at St Georges treats patients who have injured themselves through work or play. Iain, 60, is rushed in by ambulance after falling 10ft off a ladder on to his head while fixing an air-conditioning unit. Student teacher Lloyd is helped into AandE by his friend Mollie after injuring his foot on an inflatable obstacle course on their last day at university. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team treats two trauma patients arriving by helicopter on the hospitals new helipad. Eric, 75, collapsed shortly after falling from a ladder while pruning trees in his garden. He is stabilised and put in an induced coma while a CT scan is used to determine any internal injuries. IT consultant Mihhail, 29, is admitted after crashing his motorbike at high speed and again a CT scan is employed to look for hidden wounds. Hes later transferred to the Intensive Care Unit while specialists decide how to repair the damage to his liver and stop his internal bleeding. Meanwhile, 22-year-old performing arts student Maria complains of chest pains and 82-year-old Rusty is treated for a broken ankle sustained in a road accident

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch

programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien find unique items lost in peoples homes to fix up for a profit. Henry is barn searching on his doorstep in Oxfordshire, while Simon makes the long journey down from Liverpool. Its a tank off! as Simon hatches a wacky plan to turn some old tanks into a pizza oven, while Henry turns a redundant water tank into a mobile shelving unit

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien find unique items lost in peoples homes to fix up for a profit. The boys head to Suffolk to meet Margaret, an avid collector who is also a former mayor, so they need to be on their best behaviour

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

At feedback time, it becomes clear that glamping isnt for everyone

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment Day sees Craig and Greta keen to get to the bottom of facilities faults, before Alex points the finger at them about some unsavoury feedback scores. Matt wants to question Alexs cleanliness comments, and Joanne and Andy have some beef over their breakfast scores

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Events boss Sharon hosts the final night in Manchester. With her hearty decadent menu on offer, she has to win over Cleona after a bust up on from Cleonas turn as host. Sharons skills and decorum are put to the test, though Mozz, Matt and James are on hand for moral support

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition commences at Churchills Hotel in Barnsley, where the guests are treated to a day out at a nearby mill and the hotels first ever breakfast service

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest continues at Darnells Farm Luxury Glamping in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, where arachnophobe Snehal checks every corner of his lodging for unwanted eight-legged guests

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer offer their expert advice to more potential homeowners. programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Chippenham to help Tim and Sonia decide whether to sell or renovate their home. Eight years ago, the couple moved into Tims childhood home to take care of his elderly mother. Nowshe has died, Tim and daughter Ella are ready to move on to a fresh start in a new home, but Sonia thinks with a little work they can start their new chapter without having to move

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Bedfordshire Police around the clock as they investigate a number of major crimes. A man emerges from a hotel lift covered in blood and holding a fire extinguisher, before approaching the reception desk and shouting that he has killed someone. Cameras follow every twist and turn as detectives try to work out what really happened at the hotel close to Luton Airport, which has suddenly become a chaotic and bloody crime scene

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Freddie, seven, is brought in after falling several metres from a tree in his garden. Hes been in and out of consciousness and doctors are concerned he could have head or spinal injuries. Martin, 66, collapsed at home and spent the night on the floor, and hes now experiencing poor eyesight and dizziness. The stroke team diagnoses a blood clot, but because of the amount of time that has passed since the incident, clot-busting drugs will have little effect. Elsewhere, eight-year-old Jayden has come to St Georges with swollen eyes, the result of severe hay fever

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Will, 13, arrives by helicopter after a serious collision with someone during a game of baseball, while in the paediatric area, teenage parents Connor and Saffron have arrived with their six-month-old daughter Amira, concerned about the irregular heartbeat their GP spotted. Pizza delivery rider Chris, 20, is brought in to resus following a motorbike accident. Series following life inside the AandE department of St Georges Hospital, south-west London

programme.title: Women Under Hitlers Flag
programme.desc: German women may be perceived as passive witnesses to the horrific crimes committed by the Nazi regime. However, as this documentary reveals many were active participants that were as brutal and merciless as their better-known, male counterparts. The first of two episodes begins with Hitlers arrival in power in 1933 and goes back to the roots of the indoctrination of young German girls within the female branch of the Hitler Youth (BDM)

programme.title: Iron Curtain: Living Under Soviet Occupation
programme.desc: In 1945, as his Red Army advanced towards Berlin to liberate Europe from Nazism, Stalin pursued another goal - to join the countries of Eastern Europe to his empire. In just a few years he succeeded in imposing the Soviet totalitarian model with an iron fist across Poland, Hungary, East Germany and Czechoslovakia. Citizens of those nations tell their stories of how their countries were occupied and transformed into communist states

programme.title: King Arthurs Britain: The Truth Unearthed
programme.desc: With access to a major new excavation on the Tintagel peninsula in Cornwall, Professor Alice Roberts pulls together the latest evidence to reveal what Dark Age Britain was really like. Long known to have been a Dark Ages settlement, the new evidence reveals that Tintagel was also a seat of power, and Alice explores the link between the location and Arthurian legend, tracking down the early sources for the period and the first written reference to King Arthur

programme.title: Forensic Detectives

programme.title: FBI Files
programme.desc: An investigation into a series of armed robberies at gambling houses, including the MGM Grand Hotel and Casino in Las Vegas, which led to the arrest of a recently paroled man

programme.title: FBI Files
programme.desc: One year after the original crime, new clues emerge regarding the location of the suspects in an armed home invasion during which a police officer was shot

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.sub-title: Baby for Sale and Chris Welsh
programme.desc: The case of Joe and Keith Barnett, who after trying unsuccessfully for a child looked into surrogacy. However, their chosen carrier scammed out of £10,000. Plus, Robert Rinder looks at the crimes of Liverpudlian drug lord Chris Welsh, who orchestrated a £200m cross-border cartel

programme.title: Love, Honor, Betray

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: A traffic accident seemed to be the cause of the death of a teenage driver. However, an autopsy revealed a sinister crime and CCTV footage was referenced to find her killer

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: Harold Shipman was a much-loved doctor. Millions watched the GP speaking on TV discussing the benefits of care, not knowing hed already killed dozens of patients

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: In 2018, Steve Clayton died in unusual circumstances. His body was found at the bottom of the stairs and the autopsy showed signs of poisoning

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Brett and Mona Wehde lived a quiet life in sleepy rural Iowa raising their three children. When a new family arrived, relationships were made. However, behind closed doors a wicked plot was hatched leading to the fatal shooting of 20-year-old Dustin Wehde in December 2001

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: In Dallas, Texas, surgical patients were falling victim to a monster with a medical degree. Dr Christopher Duntsch - aka Dr Death - was later found guilty of gross malpractice

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder return to examine more real-life cases, looking at the events leading up to crimes, going through the police investigations and summing up the trials. programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: The case of Beth von Steinner. Days after she was reported missing, her frozen body was found behind her house. With no witnesses or suspects, only CCTV footage could reveal the exact fate that had behallen her

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files of a Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A mother calls on Texas Ranger Jim Holland, desperate for his help to solve the cold case murder of her son Joseph, executed in the East Texas woods

programme.title: Inside the Arrest

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: Forensic Detectives

programme.title: Forensic Detectives

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Born Without Trace
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell follow the stories of foundlings as they search for answers about why they were left as babies and try to find their birth families. programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Born to an Irish mother and a Jamaican father, radio presenter Dev Griffin grew up feeling he didnt fit in with either community so hopes discovering more about his ancestors will help strengthen his sense of identity and belonging. In Ireland, Dev uncovers the momentous events surrounding the lives of his Irish grandmothers dad, his great grandfather. Following his fathers line, Dev travels to Jamaica, where an emotional meeting with a newly discovered aunt leads him to an incredible document from the local Baptist church that reveals the daily lives of his great grandparents. Narrated by Phil Davis

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actress Lesley Sharp was adopted at just five weeks old, having been born as a result of her birth mothers affair with a married man. Knowing that her biological father has died, she now sets out to learn more about him, tracing her half siblings and delving deeper into the paternal side of her family. She discovers that her great-great-grandfather fostered Barnardos children, so follows the trail of one of them all the way to Canada to hear tales of what kind of home her relative provided

programme.desc: Lucy inherited her fathers property and hopes to give it to son Ben. But neither of them can step foot inside after experiencing inexplicable horror

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Serhat Ahmet and Catherine Southon tour the East Midlands in their lilac classic car, where they scour the shops for something special to take to auction. After being snubbed by one antique shop inhabitant, Serhat amasses a diverse collection of items, but still manages to slip in some of his beloved porcelain

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Serhat Ahmet tour East Anglia hunting for antiques. As their quest continues, Serhat meets the great nephew of a woman who broke the social norms of the day to go to fight on the front line. Catherine, meanwhile, gets to sample a local delicacy that sounds rather unappealing, but has sustained the local population for centuries. The competing duo then head to a picturesque spot by a windmill to watch their items go under the hammer at auction

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Cathy Hodd has a remote-control model battleship built from scratch for her by her grandfather. She turns to model expert David Burville to help restore it to its former glory. Other items seeking some much-needed attention include a Victorian garden watering syringe and an electrical meter that belonged to someone dear. Presented by Jay Blades

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus clears a garage packed to the brim with rare antiques. Later, he meets a woman and her collection of valuable ceramic horses

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Serhat Ahmet and Catherine Southon tour the East Midlands in their lilac classic car, where they scour the shops for something special to take to auction. Catherine gets swept up in the romance of an item containing a wartime love story. programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Serhat Ahmet tour East Anglia hunting for antiques. As their quest continues, Serhat meets the great nephew of a woman who broke the social norms of the day to go to fight on the front line. Catherine, meanwhile, gets to sample a local delicacy that sounds rather unappealing, but has sustained the local population for centuries. The competing duo then head to a picturesque spot by a windmill to watch their items go under the hammer at auction

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Cathy Hodd has a remote-control model battleship built from scratch for her by her grandfather. She turns to model expert David Burville to help restore it to its former glory. Other items seeking some much-needed attention include a Victorian garden watering syringe and an electrical meter that belonged to someone dear. Presented by Jay Blades

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House

programme.title: The Last Irish Missionaries
programme.desc: Part one of two. At its peak in the 1960s, over 6,000 Irish Catholic missionaries were dispersed over 80 countries. In the modern day there are fewer than 500, marking the end of an era. Bryan Dobson and Dearbhail McDonald trace the beginning of the modern Irish missionary movement, meeting those who have returned to a changed Ireland after a life of service overseas and those who are still on the frontline in some of the worlds toughest environments

programme.title: Red Eye
programme.desc: Eighteen months after Russia is blamed for shooting down a new cargo plane over the Atlantic, DS Hana Li is summoned to investigate the murder of an American diplomatic courier at Heathrow. The investigation leads her to Londons US Embassy where new American Ambassador Ronald Tillman is hosting a party. Realising the killer has infiltrated the building, Hana and US Embassy security chief Clay Brody hunt them down. Meanwhile, a Russian threat is received onboard a UK Government jet. Thriller, starring Jing Lusi, Martin Compston and Lesley Sharp

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr consider the kitchen. With a love for eating and entertaining, its crucial to the project that they get this social space perfect. They plan a Spanish-tiled extravaganza, but are initially unable to agree on a colour scheme. Alans sloppy bricklaying skills are put to the test when Scott ropes him in to try to build a traditional cooker hood, but Amanda is unimpressed with the result. The best friends head to Seville for a tapas tour at the citys gastronomic hub. Though not a fan of heights, Alan prepares to face his fears when invited on a rock-climbing course

programme.title: Hell for Leather: The Story of Gaelic Football
programme.desc: Cora Staunton, Jim McGuinness and Jack McCaffrey reveal the deep, personal sparks that ignited their passion for the game. Doing it for the community - and with the support of numerous mentors - it was the parish that first roared them all on. For many in the south, Gaelic Football was just a game but in Northern Ireland it went further, deeply enmeshed in identity and tribalism. This episode travels across the border to hear how the game and its players fared through a century of strife

programme.title: Live UEFA Champions League
programme.desc: Paris Saint-Germain v Liverpool (Kick-off 8.00pm). Peter Collins presents all the action from the quarter-final first-leg tie at Parc des Princes. These teams met in the last 16 stage last term and the Reds claimed a 1-0 win here thanks to a goal by substitute Harvey Elliott, only for PSG to prevail by the same scoreline at Anfield and prevail on penalties. The French outfit went on to lift the trophy, and their 8-2 aggregate dismantling of Chelsea in the previous round will give them high hopes of retaining the title

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Members of the Naval Criminal Investigative Service search for a missing undercover agent in the midst of an active hostage situation. Action drama, starring Sean Murray, David McCallum and Mark Harmon

programme.title: Shush
programme.desc: Ruths love for baby Fia is undeniable. But under the strain of loneliness and a difficult domestic existence, the mother impulsively makes a drastic decision

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr go all-out designing a Moorish-themed master bedroom. Amanda steers the ship in the bedroom whilst Alan takes charge in the adjoining lounge. However, creative tensions soon arise when Amanda wants to get rid of Alans favourite curved arch which links the spaces together. The DIY duo take some much-needed time out to explore the picturesque coastline of Nerja, but theres trouble at sea. When Alan decides to take a shortcut, he ends up capsizing their kayak

programme.title: Am I Being Unreasonable?

programme.desc: Stacey Solomon and Liam Charles present the quarter-final, and to begin with the teams must create 24 illusion desserts, tricking the judges into thinking they are about to eat hot dogs. They must also make their version of a childhood favourite for Cherish Finden - the Singapore ice-cream sandwich - all in three and a half hours. The chefs then face a rollercoaster ride of a challenge as they create sugar and chocolate theme parks, which must also incorporate desserts

programme.title: Derry Girls

programme.title: Other Voices
programme.desc: Coverage of the Foo Fighters as they bring their stadium anthems to St James Church, An Daingean

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: Bruised by his encounter with Nicola, Danny goes to the Crimson Orchid gentlemens club to look for Maia, who Nicola has accused of corrupting Christina. Maia stonewalls Dannys questions, but when he tells her that Christina may have been murdered, her façade of indifference cracks. Danny knows that Christina was involved in criminal activity, and he assumes Maia has lured her into prostitution, but in the face of her angry denials, he realises that Christina was selling drugs

programme.title: Mancháns Europe by Train
programme.desc: Manchán Magan visits Zagreb, where he learns about the citys witch-hunting past and sips coffee in a cafe that is a replica of the Orient Express. At his next stop in Slovenias Lake Bled, he rows out to a little island church, before enjoying a locally-made picnic. Manchán goes diving in Genoa on the Italian coast and learns about an award-winning pesto sauce from local lawyer-turned-foodie Enrica Monzani

programme.title: Rising Tides: Irelands Future in a Warmer World
programme.desc: Phillip Boucher-Hayes explores what the agreement to limit global warming to below +2C means for Ireland, the economy, and the countrys way of life. He learns about the changes required to get us to our stated goals, and how they are more fundamental than what is being talked about in the mainstream

programme.title: Ar an Sliabh
programme.desc: Near Earagail in Co Donegal, Beulah undertakes a huge refurbishment project, building her dream home for her family. At Cnoc Bhreanainn, in Co Kerry, Bríd shows how to make jam with berries she picks from the mountain, while Brídín and her husband Andrew discuss their glamping business in the Glens of Antrim. In Irish

Comedy adventure based on the Captain Marvel and Shazam comics, starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong and Asher Angel

programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams (2002)
programme.desc: The pint-sized secret agents investigate a mad scientist who has meddled with powerful forces and created a host of bizarre mutant animals. However, the villain is not the only problem they have to face, as another pair of youngsters are determined to outshine them. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

programme.desc: The masked avenger stalks the streets of Gotham City, waging a nightly war against the criminal element. However, he may have met his match when the citys crime syndicate is taken over by the crazed Joker, who plans to poison the populace with toxic chemicals. Tim Burtons comic-book adventure, starring Michael Keaton, Jack Nicholson and Kim Basinger

programme.title: Batman Returns (1992)
programme.desc: The masked hero returns to face the Penguin, a grotesque crime boss dwelling in the sewers who conspires with a corrupt businessman to make himself mayor. When the tycoon tries to kill his secretary, she returns as vengeful vigilante Catwoman, who soon forms an intense relationship with the dark knight in both their costumed and real identities. Tim Burtons comic-book adventure sequel, starring Michael Keaton, Danny DeVito and Michelle Pfeiffer

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Batman Forever (1995)
programme.desc: The masked crimefighter takes on the twin threats of disfigured maniac Two-Face and insane genius the Riddler, who are plotting to control the brains of the entire world. Meanwhile, an acrobat whose family has been murdered by Two-Face steps up to join Batman in his fight against evil. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Val Kilmer, Tommy Lee Jones, Nicole Kidman, Jim Carrey and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: Batman and Robin (1997)
programme.desc: The caped crusader and his sidekick take on the villainous Mr Freeze, who plans to destroy Gotham City with an icy doomsday weapon unless his demands are met. The dynamic duo also have to contend with femme fatale Poison Ivy, who is determined to drive a wedge between them. Comic-book adventure, starring George Clooney, Arnold Schwarzenegger, Uma Thurman and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: Aquaman (2018)
programme.desc: The underwater kingdom of Atlantis is ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a huge army at his command, he plans to conquer the oceanic people before taking on the rest of the world. Arthur Curry, Orms half-brother and the human-raised heir to Atlantis, embarks on a globetrotting quest to stop him. But a ruthless mercenary is on his trail, seeking revenge. Superhero adventure, starring Jason Momoa, Nicole Kidman and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probes return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Hostages (2025)
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.desc: Documentary portrait of soul, jazz and RnB singer-songwriter Amy Winehouse, whose untimely death in July 2011 followed a well-publicised history of drugs and alcohol abuse. Director Asif Kapadia traces Amys rise and demise over the 13 years preceding her death, telling her story via her music and autobiographical song lyrics, video footage shot by friends and family, archive television clips, plus voiceover interviews with those who were personally and professionally close to her. Contributors include Pete Doherty, Mitch Winehouse, Tony Bennett, Mark Ronson and Tyler James

programme.title: Tina (2021)
programme.desc: Born Anna Mae Bullock in 1939, Tina Turner has sold in excess of 100 million records and earned numerous plaudits including Grammy awards and induction into the Rock And Roll Hall Of Fame with her first husband, Ike Turner. She was the first woman to grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine and dabbled in acting including a memorable performance opposite Mel Gibson in Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome. Following a prolonged period of ill health, Turner intends to retire from the spotlight with her second husband, Erwin Bach. She bids farewell to her fans in the emotional documentary Tina. Directed by Dan Lindsay and TJ Martin, the film invites the singer to reminisce about her turbulent life and career with glowing contributions from friends, family and fans including Oprah Winfrey and Angela Bassett

programme.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
programme.desc: Part one of two. A look at the singer-songwriters life and career, featuring interviews, performances, home movies and personal photographs

Documentary by acclaimed film-maker Errol Morris

programme.title: Annabelle (2014)
programme.desc: A man buys his pregnant wife a vintage doll, which places their lives in jeopardy. Members of a Satanic cult have their eyes on the antique toy, and break into their house to prepare a ritual that will transform the harmless plaything into a terrifying monster. Horror spin-off from The Conjuring, starring Annabelle Wallis and Ward Horton

programme.title: Mad Max (1979)
programme.desc: In the near future, Australian cop Max Rockatansky tires of battling to impose law and order on the roads and turns in his badge - only to be forced out of retirement when his wife and child are murdered at the hands of a motorcycle gang. George Millers action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Joanne Samuel and Hugh Keays-Byrne

programme.title: Mad Max 2 (1981)
programme.desc: A former cop haunted by his tragic past roams the wasteland of Australia in the aftermath of a nuclear war. He arrives at a besieged settlement and grudgingly helps protect the residents from a horde of marauding bikers who want to get hold of their valuable supply of petrol. Futuristic adventure sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Bruce Spence, Vernon Wells, Emil Minty and Kjell Nilsson

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga (2024)
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world, a kidnapped girl grows into a warrior who seeks vengeance against a great biker horde led by the crazed Dementus. Director George Millers Mad Max: Fury Road prequel, starring Anya Taylor-Joy, Chris Hemsworth and Tom Burke

programme.title: Annabelle (2014)
programme.desc: A man buys his pregnant wife a vintage doll, which places their lives in jeopardy. Members of a Satanic cult have their eyes on the antique toy, and break into their house to prepare a ritual that will transform the harmless plaything into a terrifying monster. Horror spin-off from The Conjuring, starring Annabelle Wallis and Ward Horton

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation (2017)
programme.desc: Twelve years after the death of their little girl, a dollmaker and his wife welcome a nun and several girls from an orphanage into their home. There they become the target of the craftsmans possessed creation, Annabelle. Horror, starring Anthony LaPaglia, Samara Lee and Miranda Otto.

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probes return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage (2021)
programme.desc: Struggling to cope with his alter ego Venom, Eddie Brock attempts to re-ignite his journalistic career by interviewing serial killer Cletus Kasady. However, Kasady becomes the host of the symbiote Carnage and escapes prison after a failed execution. Comic-book fantasy sequel, directed by Andy Serkis and starring Tom Hardy, Woody Harrelson and Michelle Williams

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance (2024)
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock and symbiote partner-in-crime Venom are lying low in Mexico City, on the run for the apparent murder of detective Patrick Mulligan. The cop and his bonded entity, Toxin, are actually alive at the Imperium symbiote containment programme, beneath the Area 51 US Air Force facility in the Nevada desert. Knull, the symbiotes immortal creator, dispatches hunters to locate Venoms hidden power source, the Codex, which can set Knull free to terrorise the multiverse. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Stephen Graham and Juno Temple

programme.title: Jurassic World (2015)
programme.desc: Decades on from the creation of Jurassic Park, a fully operational attraction filled with genetically engineered dinosaurs has been opened on the island. In need of a new attraction, the company behind the park creates an entirely new species - only for it to escape and terrorise the tourists. Action adventure sequel, starring Chris Pratt and Bryce Dallas Howard

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom (2018)
programme.desc: Three years after the destruction of Jurassic World, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing are asked to return to the theme park to save its resident dinosaurs from the islands active volcano. During their mission, they uncover a conspiracy that may affect the entire planet. Action sequel, starring Chris Pratt, Bryce Dallas Howard, Rafe Spall and Toby Jones

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation (2017)
programme.desc: Twelve years after the death of their little girl, a dollmaker and his wife welcome a nun and several girls from an orphanage into their home. There they become the target of the craftsmans possessed creation, Annabelle. Horror, starring Anthony LaPaglia, Samara Lee and Miranda Otto.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick

programme.title: Police Academy (1984)
programme.desc: An American police college lowers its entrance requirements in the hope of attracting new recruits, and in response, assorted dubious candidates turn up for enrolment. A short-tempered instructor is determined to weed out the bad apples, but a riot provides the clueless cops with a chance to prove their worth. Comedy, starring Steve Guttenberg, Kim Cattrall, Bubba Smith and GW Bailey

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment (1985)
programme.desc: Americas most inept cops graduate and are let loose on the streets - under the command of an unscrupulous lieutenant whose promotion depends on their failure. Fortunately for him, their unique brand of policing actually leads to an increase in the crime rate. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, David Graf and Michael Winslow

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training (1986)
programme.desc: Facing closure from cutbacks in public spending and competition from a more successful academy, the police training school calls on its bungling graduates to act as instructors and make good officers out of a bunch of new recruits even more incompetent than they are. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, Michael Winslow and Art Metrano

programme.title: Jurassic World (2015)
programme.desc: Decades on from the creation of Jurassic Park, a fully operational attraction filled with genetically engineered dinosaurs has been opened on the island.
