But how much of Americas founding story is based on fact?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits the Alaskan wilderness in search of the Iliamna Lake monster of native legend that is said to drag people down to an icy grave. Subarctic fishing is a first for the extreme angler, who secures his largest catch to date as he pursues the mysterious creature

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The opening part of an interview with the former Republic of Ireland star, as Tommy Martin talks to him about his journey through football from Sallynoggin to Manchester United to the World Cup, and his relationships with iconic managers Jack Charlton and Alex Ferguson

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Suspicion falls on Adam over missing hospital funds and Mike attends a meeting to assess the mental welfare of a 50-year-old man (guest Andrew Dunn) who still lives with his mother. Elsewhere, Gordons former father-in-law pays an unexpected visit with sobering news and Ken makes a confession to his colleagues. Guest starring Michael Jayston

programme.title: How to Lose Weight Well
programme.sub-title: From the High-Fat to the Cookie and Paleo diets
programme.desc: Dr Xand van Tulleken and dietician Hala El-Shafie help six more people lose weight with different methods. Natasha and Jodian have just two weeks to slim down before a trip to Egypt, with one trying out a high-fat diet and the other eating Mediterranean food. In Hampshire, Mike tries out a regimen that consists almost entirely of specially-made cookies and Steve is on a volumetric diet consisting of large bowls of soup or massive salads, while Gina and Max in Wigan go on paleolithic and starch diets respectively. Xand also investigates the Ken diet, which involves a protein solution being fed straight into the stomach

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Archive news documentary looking back at the headline stories of the past, focusing here on 2008

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Archive news documentary looking back at the headline stories of the past 20 years, focusing this week on 2009

programme.title: Alan Quinlan: Red Blooded
programme.desc: Part two of two. Alan Quinlan talks to Joe Molloy about his Ireland career. The back-row forward won 27 international caps during a nine-year period full of ups and downs. In the second part, he discusses becoming only the second player to reach 200 appearances for Munster and how he dealt with anxiety and mental health throughout his rugby career

programme.title: Paul OGradys Animal Orphans
programme.desc: The animal lover returns to Lilayi Elephant Nursery in Zambia, where he is reunited with Nkala, a calf he met last year. In Namibia, at Naankuse Wildlife Sanctuary, he meets five-month-old cheetah Joris, who is about to have some company in his enclosure, and Paul is also given the task of releasing two leopard tortoises back into the wild

programme.title: Hotel Benidorm: Fun-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: As the team at the Hotel Benidorm Plaza prepare to throw a party to show off the hotel to local travel agents, the Spanish resort is hit by a rare rainstorm, resulting in the hotel springing leaks and causing the electricity to cut out. Meanwhile, a 14-strong friendship group party in memory of their dear friend, and a couple celebrate their 25th wedding anniversary at Benidorms famously romantic waterfalls

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: Three singletons try to win the affections of Dom, with the buyer of the clothing picked out by the former goth going on a date with him

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The boxer talks about his life inside and outside the ring. From growing up as a triplet to when he became the first Irishman to win an Olympic Gold medal in boxing in 1992

programme.title: A Year on Planet Earth
programme.desc: Stephen Fry looks at the impact of summer in the northern hemisphere and winter in the south, revealing that wildlife faces feast, famine, fire and torrential rain in different regions around the world. On Marion Island life has frozen to a standstill, with king penguin chicks facing starvation as their parents left months ago, while in northern Australia its the dry season, and hooded parrots raise their chicks in termite mounds

programme.title: Whos Doing the Dishes?
programme.desc: Actress, comedian and writer Helen Lederer throws todays dinner party, and Brian McFadden provides another four diners with cryptic clues hinting at the identity of their mystery hostess

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: A report from Southeast Asia, of something in the water thats sliced cleanly through a young mans testicles, is enough to lure fishing detective Jeremy Wade to the shores of the Mekong - a river long renowned for its monstrous fish. But what kind of creature could have inflicted such a distinctive, surgical wound? In his quest to expose the unseen mutilator, Jeremy uncovers multiple victims whove been mauled, half-blinded, and even fatally wounded by the same mysterious assailant - a baby-faced killer that appears to be proliferating

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Soo from Halifax, Dom from North Tyneside, Nichola from Bangor and Will from London pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Real-life small-claims cases on issues affecting family life, presided over by outspoken former New York judge Judy Sheindlin

programme.title: The Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Brian Dowling and his fashion-forward design team continue their mission to prove to the nation that it is possible achieve a dream renovation at little cost. Changing Rooms meets the Repair Shop with a new sustainable twist, the challenge here is to transform our bland old rooms, furniture and fittings into unique and stunning show stoppers, using only upcycling and sustainable methods. This is the home makeover format for the world we live in today, as two households per week, each with a team consisting of an interior designer and an up-cycling wiz, have just four days and 1,000 euro to renovate and rejuvenate a tired spaces in their home, filling them with home-made, re-used and revamped furnishings. Two families are selected from the same region each week and each has a tired room in need of renovation and re-imagining containing a potential treasure trove of up-cycling gems

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Relationship-based reality show in which singletons seeking a romance compete in the hope of finding love - and winning a £50,000 prize

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions

programme.title: The Tonight Show
programme.desc: Comment and analysis on the big stories of the day in Ireland and abroad with a panel of guests covering the key issues

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The second and concluding part of an interview with the former Republic of Ireland star, as he discusses with Tommy Martin the high esteem he was held in for club and country while facing battles on and off the pitch

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Jill becomes unwell after receiving the results of a pregnancy test. Elsewhere, when a baby goes missing, suspicion falls on the parents of a girl admitted with a broken ankle. Meanwhile, Gordon makes a discovery about a diabetic patient that explains his behaviour and, in a dramatic finale, tragedy looms. Daniel Casey guest stars

programme.title: Cooking with the Stars
programme.desc: Emma Willis and Tom Allen present the celebrity cookery contest in which famous faces are mentored by world-class chefs to compete in culinary battles. In the first edition, actress Natalie Cassidy goes head to head with radio presenter Jordan North, and reality stars Jack Osbourne and Jessica Wright go up against each other, attempting to deliver gourmet dishes on a budget of just three pounds per portion. Who will go straight through and which two stars will face each other in the cook-off? Others taking part throughout the series are Hugh Dennis, Ekin-Su Culculoglu, Kelly Hoppen and Shaun Wright-Phillips

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Archive news documentary looking back at the headline stories of the past 20 years, focusing this week on 2010

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Archive news documentary looking back at the headline stories of the past 20 years, focusing this week on 2011

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: Part one of an interview with the pundit, activist, barrister and former footballer, who opens up about his life, trauma and controversies

programme.title: Paul OGradys Animal Orphans
programme.desc: In his final week in Africa, the comedian and presenter visits Bambelela, a rehabilitation centre for orphaned vervet monkeys, where he looks after 10-month-old Toledo for the day. Returning to Moholoholo Wildlife Rehabilitation Centre, Paul discovers what its like to be a volunteer, from the daily walk through the Bush, to cleaning the enclosures and encountering the smelliest animal at the facility, a honey badger called Julius. After that, he heads to Hoedspruit Endangered Species Centre to meet Little G, an orphaned rhino who has been given a permanent companion, a sheep named Lamby

programme.title: The Six OClock Show
programme.desc: Chat show featuring celebrity interviews, food from leading chefs and guidance on a wide range of topics, from consumer affairs to the latest trends, with viewers invited to contribute with pictures, comments, stories and gossip

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: Three singletons go up against each other in the ultimate shopping challenge, as they try to win the affections of picky photographer Danielle by each buying her an outfit

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The former Republic of Ireland midfielder talks about his life in professional football and his battles with addiction

programme.title: A Year on Planet Earth
programme.desc: Stephen Fry looks at autumn in the northern hemisphere and spring in the south, seasons of change that bring opportunities, but also huge challenges. By September temperatures in northern Canada can plummet as low as -20C, but there is one stretch of river that still flows and bears are able to fish for the final salmon of the season. In southern Africa the rains have been gone for many months and watering holes have all-but dried up, while a king penguin chick on Marion Island answers the call of the ocean

programme.title: Whos Doing the Dishes?
programme.desc: The contestants are guaranteed some fine food today as their mystery host is celebrity chef Aldo Zilli. Can he cook up enough cryptic clues to hide his Italian identity or will he be getting out the Fairy Liquid when the diners have all gone home? Brian McFadden plays go-between

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade is on the trail of horrifying killers from the depths of time. Fearsome, prehistoric beasts are brought back to life using cutting-edge technology and recently unearthed fossils in a quest to find the greatest river monster of all time

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Rob, Kate, Bernice and Adam pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Real-life small-claims cases on issues affecting family life, presided over by outspoken former New York judge Judy Sheindlin

programme.title: The Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Brian Dowling and his fashion-forward design team continue their mission to prove to the nation that it is possible achieve a dream home renovation at little cost. Changing Rooms meets the Repair Shop with a new sustainable twist, the challenge here is to transform our bland old rooms, furniture and fittings into unique and stunning show stoppers, using only upcycling and sustainable methods. This is the home makeover format for the world we live in today, as two households per week, each with a team consisting of an interior designer and an up-cycling wiz, have just four days and 1,000 euro to renovate and rejuvenate a tired spaces in their home, filling them with home-made, re-used and revamped furnishings. Two families are selected from the same region each week and each has a tired room in need of renovation and re-imagining containing a potential treasure trove of up-cycling gems

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Another edition of Unseen Bits that is bursting at the seams with exclusive unseen action from the Villa alongside fun, flirting, and fallouts.

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions

programme.title: Cleaning Up Ireland
programme.desc: Ryans take on Ladies Day at the Galway Races, Car Lovers restore a 21-year-old vehicle to its former glory and Lukes window cleaning team pursue the perfect streak-free shine

programme.title: Living with Lucy
programme.desc: TD Michael Healy-Rae plays host to Lucy Kennedy in Co Kerry, with the pair attending a race meeting, a garden party, a fashion show and a fancy dress party - all in one night

programme.title: Cracker
programme.sub-title: To Be a Somebody - Part One
programme.desc: Following a particularly violent murder, the police begin clutching at straws in their efforts to find the killer. Fitz knows they are on the wrong track, but stubbornly refuses to help after a fall-out with DCI Bilborough. Robert Carlyle guest stars in the first of a three-part story, with Robbie Coltrane, Christopher Eccleston and Geraldine Somerville

programme.title: Time Is Money
programme.desc: Sara Davies hosts the quiz in which contestants are given their prize money before they have answered a question, and must race against time to keep hold of it. Each player stands before an hourglass-shaped money timer that begins to drain as the questions are asked - and the only way of stopping it is to answer correctly. Once the money is gone, the contestant is out - and only one can make the final to play for the amount they have managed to save

programme.title: Im a Celebrity South Africa
programme.desc: While some embrace their new surroundings, one celebrity is far from impressed with their new living quarters. They arent holding back, making their frustrations loud and clear to their fellow campmates. As night falls, there is a series of emotional and heartwarming revelations. Ant and Dec host

Meanwhile, Ruiz and Devi are hunting for new evidence in their case when a surprising breakthrough turns the spotlight back onto Joe, whose marriage is then hit by a bombshell

programme.title: Living with Lucy
programme.desc: Presenter Lucy Kennedy heads to the Costa del Sol to live with actress Danniella Westbrook, who discusses her troubled past and her plans for the future

programme.title: The Girl Before
programme.desc: Jane learns worrying information about Edwards behaviour but she still doesnt know exactly what happened to Emma. Troubled, shes spurred on to find out more about the tragic young woman and confronts Edward, who admits he had a relationship with her. In flashback, Emma is called to the police station where the detectives are picking apart her assault - but the session ends unexpectedly. Drama, starring Gugu Mbatha-Raw, David Oyelowo and Jessica Plummer

programme.title: Gogglebox Ireland
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to revisit some of the most memorable moments from Gogglebox Ireland, demonstrating why Irelands resident telly addicts have developed a reputation for eccentricity. Includes highlights featuring the Tully twins, Angela and Eileen, Anita and Tracey, the Adenugas and the Ryans

programme.title: The Ipcress File
programme.desc: As he heads with Jean to the nuclear weapons research lab, Harry spots a suspicious stranger on their tail who is later identified as a former agent now working for anyone who will pay him. The chance arrest of one of Dawsons colleagues hands them a lead as the professor had secretly been in therapy with avant-garde psychiatrist Radley, recently returned from California with new techniques to reshape personalities

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: A look back at the stories making the headlines in 1999, set to a soundtrack of music from the year

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A trio of Australian sheep-shearers arrive in Aidensfield to help out at Grimedale Farm, but a missing watch puts one of them behind bars. Rosie is surprised by a face from the past and has to choose between two tempting offers for the future. Elsewhere, Peggy plans to start a laundry business, but leaves David doing all the work, and Phil and Gina make a life-changing decision. Former Neighbours actors Blair McDonough and Martin Crewes guest star

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The history of pioneering modern-day mega structures, revealing that behind every seemingly impossible marvel of modern engineering is a cast of historic trailblazers who designed new building techniques, took risks on untested materials and revolutionised their field

programme.title: Hotel Benidorm: Fun-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Managers at the Rio Park have clocked off for a bank holiday so its a great opportunity for junior staff to prove themselves. Abi is in charge on reception, looking after new team member Raquel and dealing with a tech malfunction, while inclement weather leaves lifeguard Daniel with nothing to do until lovebirds Andy and Mandy turn up for a swimming lesson

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On a remote lake in Malaysia, two men mysteriously vanish - just hours apart. Amid rumours that a giant fish is on the loose, biologist and monster-hunter Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. Could the killer be an interloper from South America, as reports suggest, or is there a home-grown predator that fits the bill? A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait. More than just a beast with a gruesome rap sheet, its also the one river monster that he has thus far failed to catch

programme.title: Home Fires
programme.desc: Frances takes in an evacuee from Liverpool, who is not what she expected. Erica is forced to face the consequences of her actions, while Miriam writes letters to soldiers on the front line that cause more harm than good. Laura and Richards secret affair is jeopardised when someone sees them together, Teresa receives devastating news, and Claire must decide whether or not to stand by Spencer

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Kate seeks Nicks advice about one of her patients, who seems to be receiving threats, and Greengrass tries to take the law into his own hands. Dora Bryan guest stars

programme.title: How to Lose Weight Well
programme.sub-title: Bikini Bulges, Graduation and Office Reunion
programme.desc: Xand van Tulleken, dietician Hala El-Shafie and cook Stacie Stewart oversee proceedings as three more pairs road test some of the most popular and talked about diets. Rebecca and Alisha have two weeks to slim down for a family holiday abroad, Gary and Connor want to lose weight for a graduation in six weeks, and Elaine and Sue aim to shed the pounds for a work reunion in four months time

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.sub-title: The Green Man Pub and Hotel, Wembley
programme.desc: The Green Man Pub and Hotel is in a prime location near Wembley Stadium, but bad reviews and old-fashioned bedrooms are putting off guests and forcing owner Mel Preedy to rely on the establishments pub to support the hotel side of the business. Alex Polizzi heads to north London to attempt to reverse Mels fortunes

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Cain is involved in an accident, while Jacob is left humiliated and Kerry confides in Jai

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Debbie makes her presence felt at the hotel, Sam accuses Will of intimidation, Ben refuses to give Maggie the time of day, and Tim summons the courage to face Trisha

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Joan bids a fond farewell to her friends at the hospital, but a last-minute intervention by her mother makes her reconsider her decision to leave. Meanwhile, Carnegie courts a wealthy patient in the hope of raising funds for the new hospital wing, and an alcoholic lets his family down at the worst possible moment. Hospital drama, starring Kananu Kirimi and Robert Cavanah

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Grizzled copper Jack Frost teams up with an obnoxious, chain-smoking colleague to investigate a seemingly straightforward hit-and-run incident that proves to have devastating repercussions for the victims family and their peaceful rural community. David Jason, Bruce Alexander and Philip Jackson star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick is patrolling the village late one night when he goes to investigate a light in the churchyard. He finds a partially opened grave but no one there. Seconds later he is hit over the head with a spade. Elsewhere, Blaketons home life suffers. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the author of a book that sparked a nationwide treasure hunt is found dead, Barnaby and Winter must unravel the cryptic clues to find the killer among a group of dedicated seekers. Detective drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Nick Hendrix and Fiona Dolman

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Summer challenges Debbies version of how Billy died, Will denies Sams allegation that hes still seeing Megan, and Lisa and Carla leave Jodie in charge of Connie

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kyle finds Cain lying unconscious, while Kerry starts to have suspicions and Moira is concerned

programme.title: Four Lives
programme.desc: Fact-based drama telling the story of murderer Stephen Port, convicted of killing four gay men in 2016, from the point of view of his victims and their families. The first episode focuses on aspiring fashion designer Anthony Walgate and Slovakian Gabriel Kovari, who was searching for a more liberal life in London. When one of these young men is given a lethal overdose by Port, he claims to have merely discovered the body. Stephen Merchant and Sheridan Smith

programme.title: The Night Caller
programme.desc: The awful realisation of what Tony has done starts to dawn on him and he goes into survival mode, trying to cover up the horror of the previous night and asking Rob for help. On Lawrences radio show, the incident is big news, but as Tony listens to what the callers have to say, he gradually feels bolstered and somehow starts to reconcile the awful thing hes done

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Archive news stories, looking back at the headline stories from 2000 to a soundtrack of contemporary music

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When a man dies falling from a bridge Joe discovers the deceased and his girlfriend were implicated in a babys disappearance three years previously. Foul play is suspected when the mans post-mortem reveals injuries consistent with a recent fight, and deeper delving suggests someone still believes the couple were responsible for the missing child. Elsewhere, Peggys new look and odd behaviour causes a stir

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge tech and bold engineering to build a record-breaking bridge that spans a deadly chasm in a remote section of the Himalayas. When completed, it will be the worlds tallest railway bridge, towering almost 1,200 feet high

programme.title: Hotel Benidorm: Fun-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Staff are gearing up for a weekend of fun and screams as Halloween arrives. At the Flamingo, Michael is on reception with a busy day of checking in guests, while the maintenance team deals with a burst pipe. Entertainment is key to Halloween and Shari is frantically getting the decorations up, while youngster Tom is entertaining the guests

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: In an earlier investigation, Jeremy Wade was propelled into an Indian river by a goonch catfish as big as himself, yet managed to land the rare beast after an epic battle. Ten years on, Jeremy hears a report from neighbouring Nepal of a mysterious attack that sounds strangely familiar - a lone fisherman on a mountain river dragged off his feet and into the water by an unseen creature. The extreme angler contemplates whether the original river monster could be back, and sets off to find out

programme.title: Home Fires
programme.desc: As the war in Europe draws closer to home and the nation faces its darkest hour, the members of the WI find they have their own battles to fight. Alison looks for a way out of her desperate situation, and Frances tries to help Pat while she still can. Miriam keeps an important piece of news from Bryn, and Richard and Laura realise it may not be possible to keep their affair a secret any longer. Conclusion of the Second World War drama, starring Fenella Woolgar and Francesca Annis

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick is patrolling the village late one night when he goes to investigate a light in the churchyard. He finds a partially opened grave but no one there. Seconds later he is hit over the head with a spade. Elsewhere, Blaketons home life suffers. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: How to Lose Weight Well
programme.sub-title: The Gut, the Dash Diet and the Blood Sugar Diet
programme.desc: Xand van Tulleken, dietician Hala El-Shafie and cook Stacie Stewart oversee proceedings as three more pairs road test some of the most popular and talked about diets. Lucy and Sue have two weeks to slim down for a spa day, Fi and Sarah want to lose weight for a birthday party, and Bharat and Atul aim to shed the pounds for a dance routine for a Bollywood film

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi turns referee to settle a problem between Donna, the manager of Redditch hotel The Blue Inn, and the owner, who monitors her every move on CCTV cameras from her office more than 400 miles away in Paris. Despite having 15 staff, Donna works 100 hours a week and insists on getting too hands-on, so Alex asks her to devise a plan to get more heads on beds before they cross the Channel to see the boss

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kyle finds Cain lying unconscious, while Kerry starts to have suspicions and Moira is concerned

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Summer challenges Debbies version of how Billy died, Will denies Sams allegation that hes still seeing Megan, and Lisa and Carla leave Jodie in charge of Connie

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: A mix-up over the job offer results in two new doctors arriving at the hospital to take up the position. Meanwhile, Catherine makes her feelings clear to Carnegie about their relationship and Stellas night out ends badly. Hospital drama, starring Robert Cavanah

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack is asked to investigate the theft of a car belonging to a friend of Mullett, but misjudges the grizzled Superintendents capacity for tact and diplomacy and it is not long before he is taken off the case. Things take a shocking turn when the car finally turns up - with the body of a drug dealer in the boot. Detective drama, starring David Jason, with Melanie Thaw and Bruce Alexander

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A hit-and-run incident alerts Nick to the presence of badger-baiters in the village, but the outsiders from Middlesbrough will stop at nothing in pursuit of their sport. Meanwhile, Greengrass finds a way of making racehorse ownership pay

programme.title: North Shore
programme.desc: Max is shocked to hear that Meg sees their time apart as a trial separation when he takes up an offer from his sister-in-law Tori to stay with her family in Rose Bay. As the detective tries to win his wife round, he helps the investigation by persuading Abigail to make a public appeal before focusing on finding the off-grid Erica and pursuing a drugs motive and the 20,000-dollar deposit

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sarah sneaks round to see Todd while Theo is out, Jodie reveals her mischief to Gemma, Nick and Ben decide to get their sons together, and Ronnie offers Carl an olive branch

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kerry wades in, while Robert gets an idea and Pollard is left with food for thought

programme.title: Spies of Terror
programme.desc: After a terrorism attack in Paris, government agents race to catch those responsible. Secret service agents work tirelessly to locate the perpetrators of the attack, under immense pressure to prevent a recurrence. Spy thriller, starring Rachida Brakni, Fleur Geffrier, Vincent Elbaz and Pierre Perrier. In French

programme.title: The Night Caller
programme.desc: Rob advises Tony to leave town, revealing Ste Murray is involved with dangerous people - but shortly after the taxi driver is stunned when Lawrence hails his cab, stunned that he is finally getting to meet his hero. But he gets a shock to realise the radio presenter is the complete opposite of his public persona

programme.title: I Kissed a Girl
programme.desc: Priya and Naee have a big decision to make, which leads to a very frosty group discussion and an emotional night in the masseria. But no one has long to dwell on the repercussions of their choice before two new girls join the party. To cheer everyone up, the girls throw their own sports day, and hold a party in which everyone dresses as their favourite queer icon

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Over three rounds, contestants vie to find the single unbeatable answer and streak ahead of the rest to make the final where they can win a cash prize. General knowledge quiz, hosted by Jason Manford

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Amitabh, originally from Delhi, Becky from Birmingham, Derek from London and Fiona from Oldham pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Omid Djalili hosts the quiz, with contestants Romy, Carla, Emily, Francesca, Neil, Jonathan, Calum, Chris and Sally each assigned a number between one and nine, with the four that make the final trying to win the jackpot defined by those numbers. Each players number is also the total of questions they must answer correctly in the final game against the clock

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Contestants Hannah, Elayne, Rupesh and Greg vie to find the single unbeatable answer and streak ahead of the rest to win a cash prize. Quiz, hosted by Jason Manford

programme.desc: Dom is hoping to be impressed by the style choices of three potential dates

programme.title: Storage Hoarders
programme.desc: Aggie MacKenzie and antiques expert Tom Keane try to persuade couple Tim and Margaret to part with their beloved clutter. They also help a woman let go of items that are proving too expensive for her to store

programme.title: The Restaurant
programme.desc: Star of Young Offenders and the Graham Norton drama Holding, Demi Isaac Oviawe cooks for Marco Pierre White and Rachel Allen. Demi uses her heritage and her roots to create a menu that is a fusion of West Africa and Cork - but how will the diners and the critics cope with a dish where they use no cutlery?

programme.title: Heathrow: Britains Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. This time, airport staff are forced to cordon off a plane full of passengers when a runway is closed, and Ian turns detective

programme.title: Live UEFA Champions League
programme.desc: Barcelona v Atletico Madrid (Kick-off 8.00pm). All the action from the quarter-final first-leg tie at Spotify Camp Nou. The Spanish rivals have already met four times this season, with the most recent of those contests taking place in La Liga just four days ago in Madrid. Prior to that Barca claimed a 3-1 win here in the league, before Atletico prevailed 4-3 over two legs in the Copa del Rey

programme.title: Sports Gone Wrong
programme.desc: From shocking meltdowns to all-out brawls, this programme dives into the most chaotic and unexpected moments in sports history

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: An argument threatens to ignite on a crew night out, and when the drinking continues back at the boat the drama spirals out of control

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Garys finger gets stuck in the main saloon doors, causing so much pain that his patience with Kelsie is obsolete, while Gabriela works hard to amend her relationship with the crew

programme.desc: The new arrivals settle into the masseria and enjoy a cheeky chemistry test. Meanwhile, as a love triangle forms, one girl is torn between her head and her heart. The next day brings a raunchy dance class and a private pool party double date

programme.desc: The Flint family from Hertfordshire swap homes, budgets and lives with the Elayadi family from Ealing, and, though they live just 13 miles away from each other, their financial circumstances are worlds apart.
